hooks.command: jq -r '.message // ""' | { read -r m; case "$m" in *"waiting for your input"*) exit 0 ;; esac; zsh -c 'source ~/.config/zsh/win-notify.sh; win-notify "Input needed." "Claude"' ; [ -n "$TMUX_PANE" ] && printf '\a' > "$(tmux display-message -p -t "$TMUX_PANE" '#{pane_tty}')" ; } 2>/dev/null
